name: honeyku
description: Heroku-based web honeypot that can be used to create and monitor fake HTTP endpoints (i.e. honeytokens). Tool: https://github.com/0x4D31/honeyku. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #607 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map honeyku output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved honeyku output file to parse instead of running it live.
